---
title: "Web Technology — BMC201"
subtitle: "Mr. Prashant Kumar Nag"
navbar: false
toc: false
freeze: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

*This page contains an outline of the topics, content, and assignments for the semester. Note that this schedule will be updated as the semester progresses, with all changes documented here.*

```{r packages-data, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

withr::with_dir(here::here(), {
  schedule_nested <- targets::tar_read(schedule_page_data)
  targets::tar_load(schedule_ical_file)
})

base_url <- yaml::read_yaml(here::here("_quarto.yml"))$website$`site-url`
ical_url_absolute <- paste0(base_url, "/", schedule_ical_file)
```

::: {.callout-tip}
## Subscribe to Calendar

You can subscribe to this calendar URL in Outlook, Google Calendar, or Apple Calendar.

::: {.grid .align-items-center}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
<p class="download-btn"><a class="btn btn-danger" href="/`r schedule_ical_file`" role="button">{{< fa calendar-alt >}} Download ICS</a></p>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-9 .subscribe-url}
<p><input class="form-control" type="text" value="`r ical_url_absolute`" onclick="this.select()" readonly></p>
:::

:::
:::

```{r build-table, include=FALSE}
show_table <- function(group_id) {
  cat(glue::glue("\n\n<div class=\"schedule-group\"><div class=\"schedule-group-title\"><h3>{schedule_nested$group[[group_id]]}</h3></div>\n"))

  tbl <- schedule_nested$data[[group_id]] |>
    kbl(escape = FALSE, align = "rlccccc", table.attr = 'class="schedule-table"') |>
    kable_styling() |>
    column_spec(1, width = "18%", extra_css = "padding-right: 20px; white-space: nowrap;") |>
    column_spec(2, width = "42%") |>
    column_spec(3:7, width = "8%")

  cat(tbl)
  cat("</div>")
}
```

```{r show-table, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
walk(seq_len(nrow(schedule_nested)), ~show_table(.x))
```
